# Shaswat Raj

Full Stack Developer specializing in System Design, Web Dev, DevOps, and Open-Source.

## About

Coding since class 7, I am a passionate developer with 45k+ followers on Dev Community and a portfolio of 500+ projects. I build tools, libraries, and applications across the full stack.

## Key Pages

- Portfolio: https://sh20raj.github.io
- Blog: https://sh20raj.github.io/blog

## Skills

JavaScript, TypeScript, React, Next.js, Node.js, Python, Docker, Kubernetes, AWS, System Design, DevOps, Open-Source
